provider.doubao.batch.title: Doubao (Batch)
provider.doubao.batch.description: Use the Doubao / Volcengine fast file recognition API for cloud ASR.
provider.elevenlabs.batch.title: ElevenLabs (Batch)
provider.elevenlabs.batch.description: Use the ElevenLabs speech-to-text API for cloud ASR.
provider.elevenlabs.streaming.title: ElevenLabs (Streaming)
provider.elevenlabs.streaming.descriptio: Use the ElevenLabs realtime speech-to-text API for streaming cloud ASR.
provider.bailian.batch.title: Bailian (Batch)
provider.bailian.batch.description: Use Bailian Qwen3-ASR-Flash through the OpenAI-compatible chat completions API for cloud ASR.
provider.bailian.streaming.title: Bailian (Streaming)
provider.bailian.streaming.description: Use the Bailian Qwen-ASR-Realtime API for streaming cloud ASR.
provider.doubao.streaming.title: Doubao (Streaming)
provider.doubao.streaming.description: Use the official Volcengine OpenSpeech bigmodel streaming ASR API for streaming cloud ASR.
provider.doubaoime.streaming.title: Doubao IME (Streaming)
provider.doubaoime.streaming.description: Use the unofficial Doubao IME realtime ASR protocol for streaming cloud ASR.
provider.openai-compatible.batch.title: OpenAI-Compatible (Batch)
provider.openai-compatible.batch.descrip: Use an OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint for cloud ASR.
provider.openai-compatible.streaming.des: Use a WebSocket endpoint compatible with OpenAI realtime transcription events for streaming cloud ASR.
adapter.mtranserver.proxy.title: MTranServer Proxy
adapter.mtranserver.proxy.description: Expose MTranServer through an OpenAI-compatible local proxy.
model.sherpa-onnx.dolphin-base-ctc-multi: Compact Dolphin Base CTC model with support for Chinese, English, and other languages.
model.sherpa-onnx.sense-voice-zh-en-ja-k: SenseVoice multilingual model for Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Cantonese.
model.sherpa-onnx.sense-voice-funasr-nan: SenseVoice Nano multilingual model with broad language, dialect, and accent coverage.
model.sherpa-onnx.qwen3-asr-0.6b-int8.de: Multilingual offline Qwen3-ASR 0.6B model packaged for sherpa-onnx.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-small.de: Compact Chinese Paraformer model for size-sensitive local recognition.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-2023-09-: General-purpose Chinese Paraformer model for offline speech recognition.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-int8-202: Int8-quantized Chinese Paraformer model for local deployment.
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-multi-zh-han: Chinese Zipformer model for Mandarin and multiple Chinese dialects, with hotword support.
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-zh-en.title: Zipformer Zh-En
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-zh-en.descri: Bilingual Zipformer model for both Chinese and English recognition.
model.sherpa-onnx.streaming-zipformer-en: Compact English streaming Zipformer model for local realtime recognition.
model.sherpa-onnx.streaming-zipformer-zh: Chinese streaming Zipformer model for local realtime recognition.
model.sherpa-onnx.moonshine-tiny-en-int8: Compact English Moonshine model for offline local speech recognition.
